name: design-promax-style-presets
description: Feel/theme presets. Routing picks a surface; style presets lock the visual quality bar so every product gets the same clean card feel (Vault OTP reference).

clean_product.label: Clean product (Vault OTP quality)
clean_product.when: Default for almost all product UIs. Prefer this unless user asks for dense admin tables or loud marketing campaigns.

surfaces.page_bg: bg-background with soft primary radial gradients (subtle, not full-page purple)
surfaces.topbar: rounded-large border border-default-200 bg-content1 px-4 py-3 shadow-small
surfaces.icon_tile: rounded-medium border p-2 bg-primary-50 border-primary-100 text-primary

components.buttons: radius-full; primary filled for main CTA; bordered for secondary; flat danger for delete
components.chips: size=sm variant=flat for status; bordered mono for address
components.lists: stack of cards with gap-3, not raw ul lines

prefer: solar:*-linear for small actions (copy, trash, refresh)

typography.font: IBM Plex Sans (or system sans); mono for codes/addresses
typography.title: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-default-900

copy_rules: No architecture footnotes (ciphertext, Polybase, calldata, gas theory)
No contract address footers unless user asked for explorer link
Gate states: connect / wrong network / unlock as clear cards with one CTA
compose_recipe: 1. Top bar: icon tile + product name + Connect chip/button
2. Chips row: 2–3 status chips (not eng jargon)
3. Short hero: one headline + one line lede
4. Three ActionCards (icon tile + title + short description)
5. State card for gate (connect / network / unlock)
6. Main work: form Card + list of content Cards
7. Error as danger border card — not raw red text only
anti_patterns: Purple full-bleed AI marketing for product apps
Dumping 10 source packs into one page
Invented icon names not in solar/gravity-ui

marketing_campaign.label: Marketing campaign (airier, more sectioned)
marketing_campaign.notes: Still use action/feature cards and solar icons; more vertical sections and footer.

dense_admin.label: Dense admin / data
dense_admin.notes: Keep card borders and tokens; allow denser grids and sidebar chrome.

selection_rules: If user does not specify theme/feel → use clean_product
If user says 'like Vault OTP' / 'same cards' / 'that feel' → clean_product mandatory
If surface is H (wallet_dapp) → always clean_product (ignore marketing_campaign)
If surface is A marketing landing → marketing_campaign but still apply clean_product card/icon rules
If surface is F dense data → dense_admin + clean_product tokens
Style must_read files count toward the 4 primary budget: merge with route primary, dedupe, cap at 5 total if style merge needed
Never pick a random purple/glass theme outside these presets
